name: squid
description: Opinionated engineering + research agent team with progressive-disclosure specs for Python / TypeScript / Go monorepos. Ships PA / SWE / Tester / PR Reviewer / On-Call sub-agents, /plan / /implement-task / /implement-night pipelines, and a library of language/framework/infra specs that agents load on-demand. This fork adds a research agent-team (/research, /research-profile, /research-thread, /research-tutorial) and Codex support via generated adapters.
